name: cms-sanity
description: Maintain the Sanity CMS module installed by StackFoundry.
---

# Sanity CMS Maintenance Instructions

- Keep module ownership clear.
- Update docs with behavior changes.
- Add verification steps before release.
- Do not introduce provider lock-in outside the module boundary.

maintenanceSkills.name: sanity
maintenanceSkills.content:
---
name: sanity
description: Sanity CMS guidance for installed content modules.
---

# Sanity Guidance

- Keep write tokens server-only.
- Document dataset, project id, and preview behavior.
- Use typed queries or schema-generated types where possible.
- Verify draft and published content paths.
